verification_summary: Backend/script pytest, frontend Vitest, frontend build, Windows start/stop batch execution, and live free-provider integration all passed. Browser plugin screenshot verification was not completed because no browser target was available in this session.

implemented: Implemented FastAPI routes, service layer, provider adapters, and TTL cache.
Normalized Stooq CSV and Frankfurter free API data for index and FX dashboard items.
Implemented React/Vite/TypeScript dashboard UI with manual and automatic refresh.
Implemented Windows start/stop batch files with PID and guarded port handling.
Added backend, frontend, and batch-file tests under root tests directory.
risks: Free providers can be delayed, unavailable, or change symbol support.
Frankfurter fallback is daily and does not provide intraday change values.
In-memory cache is cleared when the backend process restarts.
future_improvements: Add more free fallback providers if needed.
Run screenshot regression checks when a browser target is available.
Consider deployment packaging such as Docker or service manager setup in a later stage.
decisions: Used Stooq and Frankfurter to satisfy the free and no-auth API requirement.
Mapped per-item failures to unavailable or stale instead of failing the whole summary.
Kept tests in root tests directory and configured Vite aliases to resolve src/frontend node_modules.
Added .gitignore files only under src and tests to keep generated runtime artifacts out of commit scope.
Recorded model_mismatch=true because the preferred model was Claude and the actual executor was Codex.
unresolved_items: Browser plugin screenshot verification was not performed because no browser target was available.
